title: Duecare - Evaluation Results (Safety Harness)
subtitle: Reproducible evaluation artefacts from the Duecare agentic safety harness
description:
Evaluation artefacts produced by Duecare, the agentic LLM safety harness for the Gemma 4 Good Hackathon.

Contents:
- `reports/` - markdown Duecare Run Reports generated by the Historian agent, one per workflow run across 3 domains (trafficking, tax evasion, financial crime).
- `runs.jsonl` - one WorkflowRun Pydantic dump per line with `run_id`, `git_sha`, `config_hash`, and per-task metrics.
- `domains.json` - snapshot of the shipped domain packs (card, taxonomy, rubric, pii_spec) so the eval can be replayed.

Everything is content-addressable: every artefact is tagged with `(run_id, git_sha, config_hash)` so reviewers can reproduce the same numbers locally by installing the matching wheels and re-running `duecare run rapid_probe --domain <id>`.

License: CC-BY-SA-4.0. Attribute as 'Duecare - Gemma 4 Good Hackathon submission by @taylorsamarel'.
